title: Nemorino
text: Home * Engines * Nemorino Nemorino enjoys the alleged effect of the love potion [1] Nemorino , an UCI compliant, free open source chess engine by Christian Günther , also supporting the Chess Engine Communication Protocol , written in C++ and first released in September 2016 under the GPLv3 license. Nemorino's board representation and move structure are taken from Stockfish [2] . Nemorino supports Syzygy Bases based on Basil Falcinelli's Fathom API [3] , applies a very lazy parallel search , and is able to play Chess960 . Contents 1 Etymology 2 Features 2.1 Board Representation 2.2 Search 2.3 Evaluation 2.4 Misc 3 See also 4 Forum Posts 4.1 2016 ... 4.2 2020 ... 5 External Links 5.1 Chess Engine 5.2 Misc 6 References Etymology [ edit ] Nemorino is named after the a character of Gaetano Donizetti's comic opera L'elisir d'amore , premiered on May 12, 1832 at the Teatro alla Canobbiana in Milan . Nemorino, a poor peasant, in love with Adina , asks quack doctor Dulcamara for Isolde's love potion , who sells him a bottle of cheap Bordeaux wine instead ...
